name: MRV Engenharia e Participacoes S.A.
summary: MRV Engenharia e Participa√É¬ß√É¬µes S.A., together with its subsidiaries, operates as a homebuilder in Brazil. The company operates in three segments: Real Estate Development, Urban Land Subdivisions, and Rental of Residential Real Estate. It develops, constructs, and sells company owned and third-party real estate properties; and provision of technical engineering services. The company is also involved in the development and sale of residential and commercial urban land subdivisions; and rents residential properties near urban centers. MRV Engenharia e Participa√É¬ß√É¬µes S.A. was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Belo Horizonte, Brazil.
